task_completion.description: Search for and locate the patient Li Wei (P-LIWEI).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the patient search results or patient dashboard displaying 'Li Wei' and/or 'P-LIWEI'.

task_completion.description: Locate the active admission visit dated Jan 12, 2025.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient's visit history or admissions list is visible, showing an active visit from Jan 12, 2025 in the 'General Ward'.

task_completion.description: Open the edit interface for the existing active visit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit form, modal, or page is open specifically for the Jan 12, 2025 visit, allowing modification of visit details.

task_completion.description: Change the location field to 'Intensive Care Unit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The location dropdown or text field in the visit edit form is set to 'Intensive Care Unit' (or 'ICU').

task_completion.description: Save the changes while ensuring the patient's status remains 'Admitted'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message or the updated visit record is visible, showing the new location as 'Intensive Care Unit' and the status clearly marked as 'Admitted' (not discharged).

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to perform the transfer.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the hospital management web/desktop UI. There should be no terminal windows, curl commands, or direct database manipulation scripts visible.

integrity.description: The agent updated the existing visit rather than creating a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient's visit list shows only the updated original visit. There is no evidence of a 'Create New Visit' form being submitted or multiple active visits appearing.

integrity.description: The agent did not discharge the patient.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of clicking a 'Discharge' button or filling out a discharge summary form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The patient's database ID is 'patient_p1_liwei' (UI typically shows P-LIWEI). The specific visit to be updated has the database ID 'visit_p1_liwei_001'. The target location must strictly be 'Intensive Care Unit' (or 'ICU'). The patient's status must remain 'Admitted'; any indication of 'Discharged' means the task failed.
